title: Arcade Mod Reloaded
description: Play 6 fully functional arcade classics right inside Minecraft! Tetris, Pac-Man, Pong, Snake, Space Invaders & Donkey Kong — all in one mod. Earn tickets, redeem prizes, and relive the golden age of arcades.
body:
# 🕹️ Arcade Reloaded

**Play real arcade games without ever leaving Minecraft.**

Arcade Reloaded adds fully playable arcade machines as placeable blocks in your world. Insert coins, sit down, and enjoy 6 iconic games — complete with music, sound effects, animations, a ticket system, and a prize counter.

![Arcade Machines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b6cc22ac2f8cedc387fdac6bc582fe655e7051e.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_Z77EsYIeaA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## 🎮 Games Included

| Game | Description |
|---|---|
| **Tetris** | Classic block-stacking. Clear rows, level up, and earn tickets per row cleared. |
| **Pac-Man** | Navigate the maze, eat dots, dodge ghosts — full siren & fright music included. |
| **Pong** | Face off against an AI opponent. First to 10 wins earns tickets. |
| **Snake** | Grow your snake, avoid walls. Tickets awarded on exit based on length. |
| **Space Invaders** | Defend against waves of aliens. Music gets louder as danger rises. |
| **Donkey Kong** | 4 stages: 25m, 50m, 75m, 100m. Jump barrels, ride elevators, pull rivets. (BETA) |

![Pacman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/192a5fbd1f1818bb4554373e99b4575a15b952bb.png)

---

## 🎫 Ticket & Prize System

- Playing games earns **Tickets** based on your performance.
- Spend tickets at the **Prize Counter** to redeem configurable item rewards.
- Prize list is fully customizable via `config/arcademod/prizelist.json`.

![Prize Counter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c8bc4e7cdc18a131a08380b90479e8a329c5aed.png)

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Install [Minecraft Forge 1.20.1](https://files.minecraftforge.net/) (47.x)
2. Drop `arcademod-1.0-1.20.1.jar` into your `mods/` folder
3. Launch the game and craft or find an arcade machine block

---

## 🛠️ Compatibility

- **Minecraft:** 1.20.1
- **Forge:** 47.1.0+
- **Java:** 17+

---
